channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US-Iran conflict: What’s the latest as the Islamabad talks stall?
item.description: Washington and Tehran stick to their positions as mediators hope for a diplomatic breakthrough in US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: 40 years since the world’s worst nuclear disaster in Ukraine
item.description: 40 years since the world’s worst nuclear disaster in Ukraine

item.title: Israel feared Amal Khalil, just as it did Shireen Abu Akleh
item.description: Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil was killed because she refused to be intimidated into silence.

item.title: Mali defence minister killed after coordinated attacks
item.description: Mali’s Defence Minister Sadio Camara has been killed after coordinated attacks on military sites and his home.

item.title: What lies ahead for Gaza after ceasefires in Iran and Lebanon?
item.description: Regional de-escalation may shift focus to Gaza, where deadlock over Hamas weapons, future governance threatens 'truce'.

item.title: Mali’s Defence Minister Sadio Camara killed during coordinated attacks
item.description: Death of influential minister seen as a big blow for Mali's military government during fighting with armed groups.

item.title: At least four people killed in Israeli attacks in Gaza despite ‘ceasefire’
item.description: Israeli forces keep advancing further into western Gaza, slowly expanding the area of their control in the east.

item.title: Chornobyl’s surviving ‘liquidators’ return 40 years after nuclear disaster
item.description: About 600,000 soldiers, firefighters, engineers, miners and medics cleaned up after the nuclear plant explosion.

item.title: Iran war: What’s happening on day 58 as Tehran-Washington talks stall?
item.description: Trump calls off planned trip to Pakistan by his envoys, in the latest setback to efforts to end the war with Iran.

item.title: Trump cancels US envoys' trip to Pakistan for talks on Iran war
item.description: Iran had earlier said there were no plans for a direct meeting with a US delegation led by Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner.
